name: Super Action
overview: Korea's great stunt teams have contributed to the rise of K-content worldwide. 'Super Action' through survival entertainment aims to find the best stunt team competing on their professional technique and directing skills.

trailers.title: [1차 티저] 현역 스턴트맨들이 펼치는 최초의 리얼 액션 서바이벌 #슈퍼액션 EP.1
